title: Braised Oxtail Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew made with tender oxtail and a rich, flavorful broth. Perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the oxtail until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the oxtail from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the carrots and potatoes to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the beef broth, red wine, and fermented cabbage juice to the pot.
Return the oxtail to the pot and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven.
Braise the stew for 2 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley.
